name: Underwater Blast
description: Underwater Blast is a colorful and addictive match3 puzzle game set in a lively underwater world. Players swap and match vibrant seashells, sparkling gems, and quirky ocean creatures to create explosive combos and clear challenging boards. With each level, new obstacles like seaweed traps, drifting bubbles, and hidden treasures keep the gameplay fresh and strategic. Powerups and special boosters help you unleash massive chain reactions, rewarding you with dazzling animations and high scores. Dive in and experience a fun, relaxing, yet highly engaging puzzle adventure beneath the waves!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
